channel.title: Home of Vishal Dongre 👋 on xvishaldongre

item.title: About Me
item.description: I am Vishal Dongre. A student and developer who love creating things for solving problems. I currently lived in Madhya Pradesh, India. I got my first laptop when I was in High school, after that my fall in love with computers. Things that excites me most with computers you can create things from scratch and solve a real world problem, only limitation is your imagination and time. I’m currently pursuing Bachelor of Computer Applications (B.

item.title: What I use
item.description: A list of all the tools I use.
